pass_criteria: session version is in support window

rule: remote mode must include MCP-Protocol-Version header
pass_criteria: all integration tests include valid header and pass

rule: tools/list output must match declared contract
pass_criteria: no missing/extra tool without approved change ticket

rule: if listChanged enabled notification must be emitted
pass_criteria: notification tests pass for add/remove tool events

rule: streamable HTTP server validates Origin header
pass_criteria: invalid origin returns 403 in test suite

rule: filesystem-like tools must use allowlist paths
pass_criteria: no wildcard or root-level unrestricted path in config

rule: server must pass inspector smoke tests
pass_criteria: all smoke test cases pass and report archived

rule: sdk/server must meet tier target threshold
pass_criteria: score meets target policy (for example >= 80 percent)

rule: registry metadata must match runtime behavior
pass_criteria: metadata fields and runtime capabilities are consistent

rule: all tool calls logged with minimal audit fields
pass_criteria: log sampling shows required fields completeness >= 99 percent

rule: each release has validated rollback path
pass_criteria: rollback drill executed and documented before prod rollout
